item.title: On the Road for a Code 3 Call!
item.description: Lights flashing, sirens blaring — a Code 3 call demands speed and precision. What’s the most urgent recovery you’ve ever witnessed?

media:content.media:title: On the Road for a Code 3 Call!
media:content.media:description: Lights flashing, sirens blaring — a Code 3 call demands speed and precision. What’s the most urgent recovery you’ve ever witnessed?

item.title: A Gust of Wind and Now We’re Here
item.description: One sudden gust changes everything. This clip shows how fast conditions can flip from calm to chaos. What’s the wildest wind‑related recovery you’ve seen?

media:content.media:title: A Gust of Wind and Now We’re Here
media:content.media:description: One sudden gust changes everything. This clip shows how fast conditions can flip from calm to chaos. What’s the wildest wind‑related recovery you’ve seen?

item.title: Jackknife Semi Blocking the Roadway!
item.description: Traffic came to a standstill when a semi lost control. How did this massive truck end up blocking the entire roadway?

media:content.media:title: Jackknife Semi Blocking the Roadway!
media:content.media:description: Traffic came to a standstill when a semi lost control. How did this massive truck end up blocking the entire roadway?

item.title: Finishing the Recovery
item.description: Crews worked tirelessly to clear the scene. What final steps brought this recovery effort to completion?

media:content.media:title: Finishing the Recovery
media:content.media:description: Crews worked tirelessly to clear the scene. What final steps brought this recovery effort to completion?

item.title: This Driver’s Having a Dig‑Aster!
item.description: One wrong move turned into a muddy mess. What went wrong with this driver’s dig?

media:content.media:title: This Driver’s Having a Dig‑Aster!
media:content.media:description: One wrong move turned into a muddy mess. What went wrong with this driver’s dig?

item.title: Baby Forklift Was Stuck
item.description: Even the little machines can get trapped. How did the crew free the baby forklift from its jam?

media:content.media:title: Baby Forklift Was Stuck
media:content.media:description: Even the little machines can get trapped. How did the crew free the baby forklift from its jam?

item.title: We Could Barely Move It!
item.description: The load was heavier than expected. What challenge made this move nearly impossible?

media:content.media:title: We Could Barely Move It!
media:content.media:description: The load was heavier than expected. What challenge made this move nearly impossible?

item.title: Midnight in the Median
item.description: A late‑night recovery in the median. What obstacles come with working in the dark?

media:content.media:title: Midnight in the Median
media:content.media:description: A late‑night recovery in the median. What obstacles come with working in the dark?
